pull_pipeline.exporter: scans the merge base and coverage evidence
pull_pipeline.importer: persists the base package as immutable provenance

pull_to_push_mapping.exporter: scans the merge base and coverage evidence
pull_to_push_mapping.importer: persists the base package as immutable provenance
pull_to_push_mapping.preflight: binds the persisted pull base to the live remote identity and a short-lived push session
pull_to_push_mapping.snapshot_hash_listing: lists the live remote comparison set for planning only
pull_to_push_mapping.dry_run_plan_upload: uploads the canonical plan as eligibility evidence and returns a receipt, not a lock
pull_to_push_mapping.mutation_batch_apply: revalidates fresh live evidence before every batch and again at the storage boundary
pull_to_push_mapping.journal_inspect: reads durable evidence without authorizing mutation
pull_to_push_mapping.recovery_inspect: starts with inspect and classifies finish, rollback, retry, or block before any mutating repair

auth_and_session.required_floor: at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage
auth_and_session.preflight_binding: mints one short-lived push session bound to one remote identity and one persisted pull base
auth_and_session.mutating_calls: dry-run, apply, and mutating recovery require the push session, canonical push signature, and idempotency key

push_ladder.proof: binds the persisted pull base to the live remote identity and a short-lived push session
lists the live remote comparison set for planning only
uploads the canonical plan as eligibility evidence and returns a receipt, not a lock
revalidates fresh live evidence before every batch and again at the storage boundary
reads durable evidence without authorizing mutation
starts with inspect and may block when finish or rollback cannot be proven safe
mutates only when the journal and fresh live hashes prove the action

remote_liveness.snapshot_hash_listing: planning evidence only and never write authority
remote_liveness.dry_run: uploads an eligibility receipt only and never reserves remote state
remote_liveness.apply: revalidates the live remote before every batch and again at the storage boundary
remote_liveness.journal: reads durable evidence without authorizing mutation
remote_liveness.recovery_inspect: must happen before any mutating recovery mode
remote_liveness.recovery_mutate: requires fresh live hashes plus journal evidence

journal_and_recovery.journal_inspect: reads durable evidence without authorizing mutation
journal_and_recovery.recover_inspect: must happen before any mutating recovery mode
journal_and_recovery.lease_fence: claim generation and lease expiry fence stale workers before mutation
journal_and_recovery.revalidation: mutating recovery still requires fresh live hashes plus journal evidence

proof: one private network
remote-base and remote-changed are the same remote identity at different times
exporter/importer establish the immutable pull base package before push
push preflight binds the imported base to one live remote identity and one short-lived session
push snapshot hashes are planning evidence only
push dry-run returns a receipt, not a lock
push batch apply revalidates live evidence before every batch and at the storage boundary
push journal stays read-only
push recovery inspect happens before any mutating repair
browser-visible inspection goes through the sandbox-provided 8080 ingress
separate disposable blueprints
remote-base and remote-changed are the same remote identity at different times
exporter/importer establish the immutable pull base package before push
push preflight binds the imported base to one live remote identity and one short-lived session
push snapshot hashes are planning evidence only
push dry-run returns a receipt, not a lock
push batch apply revalidates live evidence before every batch and at the storage boundary
push journal stays read-only
push recovery inspect happens before any mutating repair
browser-visible inspection goes through the sandbox-provided 8080 ingress

required_invariants: pull exporter/importer establish the immutable base package before push
push preflight must bind the persisted pull base to one live remote identity and one short-lived session
remote snapshot hash listing is planning evidence, not write authority
dry-run and apply are separate remote operations
apply must revalidate the live remote before every batch and at the storage boundary
journal inspection is read-only and never authorizes mutation by itself
recovery must begin with inspect before any mutating repair
push snapshot hashes are planning evidence only and never become write authority
push dry-run is an eligibility receipt, not a lock
authentication must be at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage
